name: Hugging Face
tagline: Open AI models and inference API
description: Run inference on thousands of open-source AI models — text generation, classification, image generation, audio, and more — via the Hugging Face Inference API.

auth.hint: Create a User Access Token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens with "Inference" permissions.

tools.name: text_generation
tools.description: Generate text with a language model (e.g. GPT-2, Mistral, Llama).

tools.name: text_classification
tools.description: Classify text into categories (sentiment, topic, etc.) using a fine-tuned model.

tools.name: image_to_text
tools.description: Generate a text description (caption) for an image using a vision model.

params.name: inputs
params.description: Image URL (public HTTPS) or base64-encoded image data
